desc: Import MEP systems from JSON with automatic cloud family loading.
summary: Import MEP systems from JSON with automatic cloud family loading. Downloads missing families from Supabase using LoadFamilyFromAdelphosCloud before placing blocks. Uses MepSegmentCreator for curve creation and ImportBlocksFromLinkedDwg for block placement. Ensures all family symbols are properly loaded and activated.
usecase: User imports MEP model from JSON and families are not in the document. User wants to import with automatic family downloads from cloud.
notfor: Importing families only (use cloud family loader directly). Importing non-MEP data formats.
precondition: Active document must be open. MEPBridge JSON file must exist. Internet connection required for cloud family downloads.
postcondition: Missing families are downloaded from Supabase and loaded into document. All family symbols are activated and available. MEP elements and blocks are created as specified in JSON.

selection_inputs.name: BasePoint
selection_inputs.prompt: Pick Revit basepoint (target origin for import)

outputs.name: FamiliesLoaded
outputs.description: Number of families downloaded from cloud

preprompts: Importing MEP systems from JSON with cloud family loading...
successprompts: Import complete: {FamiliesLoaded} families loaded, {CurvesCreated} curves, {BlocksPlaced} blocks.
MEP import finished with {FamiliesLoaded} cloud families.
